goal: Flatten the test in crates/ucil-daemon/src/storage.rs so its nextest path matches the frozen acceptance selector for P1-W2-F06.
plan_summary: The feature-list oracle entry for P1-W2-F06 fixes the acceptance selector at 'storage::test_two_tier_layout'. The current implementation on branch feat/WO-0006-symbol-extraction-chunker-storage wraps test_two_tier_layout inside '#[cfg(test)] mod tests { ... }' which makes the actual nextest path 'storage::tests::test_two_tier_layout' — no match. Since the selector is immutable (oracle level 2), the fix lives in source: remove the 'mod tests { ... }' wrapper and promote each '#[test]' function to module level with a '#[cfg(test)]' decorator.
scope_in: crates/ucil-daemon/src/storage.rs — remove '#[cfg(test)] mod tests {' wrapper and its matching '}'. Promote 'fn test_two_tier_layout' to module level and decorate it with '#[cfg(test)]' + '#[test]'. Preserve the test body verbatim — only the wrapping changes. If the file has additional test helper fns inside 'mod tests', promote each the same way or move them to a sibling helper module as needed. Ensure 'cargo nextest run -p ucil-daemon storage::test_two_tier_layout' lists and runs exactly 1 test.
scope_out: No behavior changes — the test body is identical.
No feature-list.json edits — feature oracle is frozen.
No changes to symbols.rs or chunker.rs — their selectors are NOT affected (they use a different pattern that happened to work).
acceptance: cargo nextest run -p ucil-daemon storage::test_two_tier_layout — 1 passing test
git diff HEAD~1 crates/ucil-daemon/src/storage.rs | grep -c '^-' should show removal of 'mod tests' wrapper lines
